tasks.label: dialog-smoke-repro
tasks.command:
set -e; tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); mkdir -p "$tmpdir/home" "$tmpdir/game" "$tmpdir/reshade/reshade/latest" "$tmpdir/reshade/game-state" "$tmpdir/reshade/game-shaders"; touch "$tmpdir/game/game.exe" "$tmpdir/reshade/reshade/latest/ReShade64.dll" "$tmpdir/reshade/reshade/latest/ReShade32.dll" "$tmpdir/reshade/d3dcompiler_47.dll.32" "$tmpdir/reshade/d3dcompiler_47.dll.64"; cat > "$tmpdir/input.txt" <<EOF
i
m
$tmpdir/game
y
y
EOF
HOME="$tmpdir/home" MAIN_PATH="$tmpdir/reshade" UPDATE_RESHADE=0 SHADER_REPOS=';' script -qec 'UI_BACKEND=dialog ./reshade-linux.sh < "$0"' /dev/null "$tmpdir/input.txt"
